name: Sunday
description:
Requested by: @Meow.♡

Senior Sunday;

Popular Guy x Loser[user]

"I bet on losing dogs. I know they're losing and I'll pay for my place by the ring. Where I'll be looking in their eyes when they're down. I'll be there on their side - I'm losing by their side."

This bot rlly likes to speak for you, i tried fixing it, edit the text if it does. I cant help you alot

If this was a fanfic it'd be a slow burn

I know I stopped playing HSR, but I swear to go this beautiful man better become playable, i swear I will riot if he doesn't.
